input: 哪些属于“氢燃料电池“领域但没有任何法律状态记录的专利？给我列出申请号和标题。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'氢燃料电池'})
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus) }
RETURN p.title_cn AS title, p.application_no AS application_no, p.application_date AS application_date
ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 能否找出从未被任何专利“OWNED_BY“的公司机构名单？
output:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.entity_type = 'company'
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (:Patent)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o) }
RETURN o.name AS org_name
ORDER BY org_name
LIMIT 30

input: 统计一下：在中国（CN）公开的专利里，有多少没有任何IPC分类？
给我看看哪些专利完全不属于任何专利族（PatentFamily）。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE NOT (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(:PatentFamily)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 有哪些专利发生了转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）但缺少转让来源方（TRANSFERRED_FROM）记录？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization)
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title
LIMIT 20

input: 是否存在：已经标注了诉讼类型但没有任何对方当事人（LITIGATED_WITH）的专利？列出来。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_LITIGATION_TYPE]->(:LitigationType)
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title
LIMIT 20

input: 统计：法律状态为“授权“的专利中，有多少没有任何权利人（OWNED_BY）记录？
在“储氢技术“领域中，哪些专利摘要为空且同时也没有IPC分类？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'储氢技术'})
WHERE (p.abstract_cn IS NULL OR trim(p.abstract_cn) = '')
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(:IPCCode) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 哪些机构当过被许可方（LICENSED_TO）但从未作为许可方（LICENSED_FROM）出现过？
列出同时发生过许可（LICENSED_TO）和质押（PLEDGED_TO）的专利。
哪些专利既发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）又卷入过诉讼（LITIGATED_WITH）？
有没有专利的申请人（APPLIED_BY）和权利人（OWNED_BY）不是同一家机构？给我举例。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization), (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o:Organization)
WHERE a <> o
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, a.name AS applicant, o.name AS owner
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 帮我列出存在完整转让链条（TRANSFERRED_FROM 与 TRANSFERRED_TO 同时存在）的专利，并显示转出/转入双方。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(from:Organization), (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, from.name AS transferred_from, to.name AS transferred_to
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 30

input: 哪些专利同时存在许可方（LICENSED_FROM）和被许可方（LICENSED_TO）记录？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LICENSED_FROM]->(licensor:Organization), (p)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(licensee:Organization)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, licensor.name AS licensor, licensee.name AS licensee
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 30

input: 诉讼类型为“侵权诉讼“的专利中，哪些还发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_LITIGATION_TYPE]->(:LitigationType {name:'侵权案件'})
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title
LIMIT 20

input: 能否列出同时被质押（PLEDGED_TO）且发生诉讼（LITIGATED_WITH）的专利？
有哪些专利把同一家机构既作为转入方（TRANSFERRED_TO）又作为被许可方（LICENSED_TO）？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization)
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(o) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, o.name AS org
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 哪些专利同时与至少两家不同机构发生过诉讼关系（LITIGATED_WITH）？请返回对方机构列表。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(o:Organization)
WITH p, collect(DISTINCT o.name) AS opponents
WHERE size(opponents) >= 2
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, opponents
ORDER BY size(opponents) DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 筛选出申请年份为2022且同时发生过质押（PLEDGED_TO）与转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）的专利。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2022'
  AND EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }
  AND EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title
ORDER BY p.application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 哪些专利族同时在CN和US都有公开成员？请按专利族规模排序。
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.name) AS countries, count(DISTINCT p) AS family_size
WHERE '中国' IN countries AND '美国' IN countries
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, family_size, countries
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 有没有那种“整个专利族的所有成员“法律状态都为授权的专利族？列出专利族ID和成员数。
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH f, collect(COALESCE(ls.name,'无')) AS statuses, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE n > 0 AND all(s IN statuses WHERE s = '授权')
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 找出至少有一个成员涉及诉讼（LITIGATED_WITH）的专利族。
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) })
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 哪些专利族至少有2件成员专利的IPC前缀属于H01M？
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M'
WITH f, count(DISTINCT p) AS h01m_cnt
WHERE h01m_cnt >= 2
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, h01m_cnt
ORDER BY h01m_cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 以“国家电投氢能科技有限公司“为例，它拥有（OWNED_BY）的专利主要集中在哪些专利族？给出TOP15。
output:
MATCH (o:Organization {name:'国家电投氢能科技有限公司'})<-[:OWNED_BY]-(p:Patent)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f:PatentFamily)
WITH f, count(DISTINCT p) AS owned_cnt
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, owned_cnt
ORDER BY owned_cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

input: 哪些专利族的成员跨越了不止一个技术领域（BELONGS_TO）？请把领域列表也返回。
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS domains, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE size(domains) > 1
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, domains
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 有没有专利族满足：族内至少一件专利发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO），并且族内至少一件专利发生过许可（LICENSED_TO）？
output:

WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) })
  AND any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) })
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 哪些专利族包含日本（JP）公开成员，但完全没有中国（CN）公开成员？

input: 请统计名称包含“氢枫“的机构中，公开国家与机构所在国家不一致的专利数量。

input: 对比北京与上海：申请专利的授权率分别是多少？（授权数/总数）
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province IN ['北京市','上海市']
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH loc.province AS province,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN p END) AS authorized
RETURN province, total, authorized,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(authorized) / total END AS auth_rate
ORDER BY auth_rate DESC

input: 对比“东方电气集团有限公司“和“上海氢枫能源技术有限公司“：各自申请专利中境外公开（非CN）占比是多少？
output:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name IN ['东方电气集团有限公司','上海氢枫能源技术有限公司']
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH o.name AS org,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.name <> '中国' THEN p END) AS abroad
RETURN org, total, abroad,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(abroad) / total END AS abroad_share
ORDER BY abroad_share DESC

input: 按二级技术域（若有父域则取父域，否则取自身）统计授权率，并按授权率从高到低排序。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:PARENT_DOMAIN]->(parent:TechDomain)
WITH p, coalesce(parent, d) AS lvl2
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH lvl2.name AS domain,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN p END) AS authorized
RETURN domain, total, authorized,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(authorized) / total END AS auth_rate
ORDER BY auth_rate DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 按年份对比：在“氢燃料电池“领域中，涉诉专利占比（涉诉/总量）是多少？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'氢燃料电池'})
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH year,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }]) AS litigated
RETURN year, total, litigated,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(litigated) / total END AS litigation_rate
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 15

input: 对比CN与US：只要专利族中存在该国公开成员，就计入该国；分别给出专利族平均规模（平均成员数）。
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS members
WITH f, size(members) AS family_size
UNWIND ['中国','美国'] AS country_name
WITH country_name, f, family_size
WHERE EXISTS {
  MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {name: country_name})
}
RETURN country_name AS country, avg(family_size) AS avg_family_size, count(DISTINCT f) AS families
ORDER BY country

input: 对名称包含“中国石化“的机构，比较其作为受让方（TRANSFERRED_TO）与作为被许可方（LICENSED_TO）的数量，并给出转让/许可比值。
output:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name CONTAINS '中国石化'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p1:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p2:Patent)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(o)
WITH o, count(DISTINCT p1) AS transferred_in, count(DISTINCT p2) AS licensed_in
RETURN o.name AS org, transferred_in, licensed_in,
       CASE WHEN licensed_in = 0 THEN null ELSE toFloat(transferred_in) / licensed_in END AS transfer_to_license_ratio
ORDER BY transfer_to_license_ratio DESC
LIMIT 5

input: 对比深圳与苏州：各自申请专利的质押率（发生PLEDGED_TO的专利数/总专利数）是多少？

WHERE loc.city IN ['深圳市','苏州市']
WITH loc.city AS city, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH city,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }]) AS pledged
RETURN city, total, pledged,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(pledged) / total END AS pledge_rate

input: 在2021年申请的专利中，对比清华大学与浙江大学：H01M类IPC专利占比各是多少？

WHERE o.name IN ['清华大学','浙江大学']

WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2021'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WITH o.name AS org,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' THEN p END) AS h01m

input: 给我汇总中国科学院大连化学物理研究所申请的专利：可选返回法律状态、专利族、公开国家、IPC列表，以及是否涉诉与对方机构。
output:
MATCH (o:Organization {name:'中国科学院大连化学物理研究所'})
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f:PatentFamily)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(opp:Organization)
WITH p,
     coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status,
     coalesce(f.family_id,'无') AS family_id,
     coalesce(c.name,'未知') AS pub_country,
     collect(DISTINCT ipc.code) AS ipcs,
     collect(DISTINCT opp.name) AS opponents
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title_cn AS title,
       status,
       family_id,
       pub_country,
       ipcs,
       CASE WHEN size(opponents) = 0 THEN '否' ELSE '是' END AS has_litigation,
       opponents
ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 列出部分公司机构（名称含“氢“或“能源“）：同时给出省份（如有）、拥有专利数、被许可进入数、被质押进入数。

input: 给我一份涉诉专利清单：包含诉讼类型（如有）、法律状态（如有）、公开国家（如有）、对方机构及其role属性。

LIMIT 20

input: 请问哪些专利族的申请年份跨度很大（最大年-最小年>=6年）？

     min(toInteger(substring(p.application_date, 0, 4))) AS minYear,

     count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE (maxYear - minYear) >= 6

input: 请分析各省：以申请机构所在地为准，储氢技术（含其子域）专利占该省全部氢能专利的比例是多少？

WITH loc.province AS province, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH province,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS {
       MATCH (x)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)-[:PARENT_DOMAIN*0..]->(:TechDomain {name:'储氢技术'})

input: 请分析各省：机构层面汇总转入（TRANSFERRED_TO）与转出（TRANSFERRED_FROM）专利数量，并给出净值（转入-转出）。

OPTIONAL MATCH (pOut:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(o)

input: 我想知道：按专利族最早申请年份统计，跨国专利族（公开国家>=2）占比是多少？

input: 请给我一份2024年申请专利的“全量画像”：申请人、权利人、技术领域、专利族、公开国家、法律状态列表、IPC列表（缺失则填默认）。

WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2024'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f:PatentFamily)

input: 请问能否给出专利族概览：成员申请号样例、公开国家列表、法律状态列表、技术领域列表，以及该族是否存在涉诉成员？
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
WITH f,
     collect(DISTINCT p.application_no) AS members,
     collect(DISTINCT c.name) AS countries,
     collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses,
     collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS domains,
     collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id,
       size(members) AS family_size,
       members[0..10] AS sample_members,
       countries,
       CASE WHEN size(statuses)=0 THEN ['未知'] ELSE statuses END AS statuses,
       domains,
       CASE WHEN any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }) THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_litigation
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 想了解诉讼画像：按对方机构汇总其涉及的专利数量、角色role集合、诉讼类型集合和专利法律状态集合（各取样例）。

input: 请给我看看专利业务事件标记：每件专利是否发生许可/质押/转让/诉讼（是/否）。

     CASE WHEN EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) } THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_transfer,
     CASE WHEN EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) } THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_litigation
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, has_license, has_pledge, has_transfer, has_litigation
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

input: 想了解机构技术偏好：按权利人统计其TOP3 IPC前缀（前4位），并带上机构省份。
output:
MATCH (o:Organization)<-[:OWNED_BY]-(p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WITH o, loc, substring(ipc.code, 0, 4) AS prefix, count(DISTINCT p) AS cnt
WITH o, loc, prefix, cnt ORDER BY cnt DESC
WITH o, loc, collect({prefix: prefix, cnt: cnt}) AS pref_counts
RETURN o.name AS org, coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province, pref_counts[0..3] AS top_prefixes
ORDER BY org
LIMIT 20

input: 请问能否列出专利的技术域及其上级域（若存在PARENT_DOMAIN），用于检查领域层级是否完整？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:PARENT_DOMAIN]->(parent:TechDomain)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, d.name AS domain, coalesce(parent.name,'无上级') AS parent_domain
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

input: 想了解：机构所在地的层级关系（Location→PARENT_LOCATION），请列出机构、地点、上一级与上上一级地点名称。
output:
MATCH (o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (loc)-[:PARENT_LOCATION]->(pl:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pl)-[:PARENT_LOCATION]->(pl2:Location)
RETURN o.name AS org,
       loc.name AS location,
       coalesce(loc.city,'未知') AS city,
       coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province,
       coalesce(pl.name,'-') AS parent1,
       coalesce(pl2.name,'-') AS parent2
ORDER BY org
LIMIT 25

input: 请给我看看：公开国家与申请机构所在国家不一致的专利，并补充其法律状态与IPC列表。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(al:Location)
WHERE al.country IS NOT NULL AND c.name <> al.country
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WITH p, c, a, al, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses, collect(DISTINCT ipc.code) AS ipcs
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title,
       c.name AS published_country,
       al.country AS applicant_country,
       a.name AS applicant,
       CASE WHEN size(statuses)=0 THEN ['未知'] ELSE statuses END AS statuses,
       ipcs
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 请分析：哪些专利族同时在CN和US公开，但整个专利族里没有任何成员是授权状态？
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.name) AS countries
WHERE '中国' IN countries AND '美国' IN countries
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p2:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p2)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH f, countries, collect(DISTINCT coalesce(ls.name,'无')) AS statuses, count(DISTINCT p2) AS n
WHERE NOT ('授权' IN statuses)
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, countries, statuses
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 我想知道：各省境外公开专利（非CN）的授权率是多少？（授权数/境外公开总数）
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WHERE c.name <> '中国'
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH loc.province AS province,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total_abroad,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN p END) AS authorized_abroad
RETURN province, total_abroad, authorized_abroad,
       CASE WHEN total_abroad = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(authorized_abroad) / total_abroad END AS abroad_auth_rate
ORDER BY abroad_auth_rate DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 想了解：哪些跨国专利族（公开国家>=2）中，存在H01M成员且该成员还涉诉？
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode) WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' }
               AND EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) })
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, ps, collect(DISTINCT c.name) AS countries
WHERE size(countries) >= 2
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size, countries
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 请帮忙查一下：发生过转让但缺少权利人记录的专利有哪些？并尽量补全转让双方、法律状态与公开国家。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(:Organization) }
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(from:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title,
       coalesce(from.name,'未记录') AS transferred_from,
       coalesce(to.name,'未记录') AS transferred_to,
       coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status,
       coalesce(c.name,'未知') AS country
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

input: 请分析：按申请年份统计，在发生过任一业务事件（转让/许可/质押）的专利中，同时发生许可+质押的占比是多少？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH year,
     [x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) } OR EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) } OR EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }] AS event_ps,
     [x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) } AND EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }] AS both_ps
RETURN year,
       size(event_ps) AS with_any_event,
       size(both_ps) AS with_license_and_pledge,
       CASE WHEN size(event_ps) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(size(both_ps)) / size(event_ps) END AS both_share
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 15

input: 我想知道：在DE公开、已授权且IPC为C25B前缀的专利中，哪些是中国机构申请的？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {name:'德国'})
MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'C25B'
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.country = '中国'
RETURN DISTINCT p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, o.name AS applicant, loc.province AS province, ipc.code AS ipc
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 请分析：按公开国家统计，存在涉诉成员的专利族，其平均专利族规模是多少？
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, count(DISTINCT p) AS family_size
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(x:Patent)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p2:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH DISTINCT c.name AS country, f, family_size
RETURN country, avg(family_size) AS avg_family_size, count(DISTINCT f) AS families
ORDER BY avg_family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

input: 请问制氢技术里IPC为C25B前缀、但没有在CN公开过的专利有哪些？
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'制氢技术'})
MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'C25B'
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {name:'中国'}) }
RETURN DISTINCT p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, ipc.code AS ipc
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 请分析：哪些专利存在多个法律状态且发生过转让？并返回转入方及其省份。
output:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH p, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses
WHERE size(statuses) >= 2
  AND EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WITH p, statuses, collect(DISTINCT to.name) AS transferees, collect(DISTINCT coalesce(loc.province,'未知')) AS to_provinces
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title_cn AS title, statuses, transferees AS transferred_to, to_provinces
ORDER BY size(statuses) DESC, application_no
LIMIT 20

input: 我想知道：申请机构在北京市、且专利族公开国家至少3个的专利族有哪些？同时返回该族授权成员数量。
output:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '北京市'
WITH DISTINCT f
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(m:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.name) AS countries
WHERE size(countries) >= 3
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(m2:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (m2)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH f, countries,
     count(DISTINCT m2) AS family_size,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN m2 END) AS authorized_cnt
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, family_size, countries, authorized_cnt
ORDER BY size(countries) DESC, authorized_cnt DESC
LIMIT 20
